itemListElement.reviewBody:
I am a recent Shiv Nadar parent. And already the school has instilled a sense of pride in me as a SNS parent. Right from the admission process, to the orientation, to the early years program, I am very impressed by the school and its operations. A welcoming team at the school has made my child and us as parents feel a part of the family in a very short span of time. The class teachers of my child are excellent, very involved and always making early learning fun for the children. I am also happy about the school taking the pain to make off site activities a part of the early years program.
Hope they stay on this path and keep achieving more success as an educational institution.
Working at Shiv Nadar School, Gurgaon has been an amazing experience. It's such a nice place to work at. Has changed me not only as a teacher but also has improved me as a human.
Its my kids favourite school! There are amazing teachers and a lot of events and so much more!

Shiv Nadar School is a really progressive space that offers it's children space to blossom and grow in their own area of interests instead of pushing them into pre-determined moulds. There are up to date procedures and processes at each point, and several kind and helpful people to keep the children safe and well attended to. There are able counsellors, clean and orderly mess with well planned meals, compassionate, friendly and approachable principal, vice principal, admin staff and teachers, the bus drivers and assisting staff are good, strict and efficient. Kids get a lot of exposure to everything - music, art, sports, theatre, dance, clubs for each of these things for parents as well, and lots more. What's not to love about this school. Makes you want to be a kid and attend school all over again. :)

I recently visited the school, overall is gud but they don't have cold drinking water facility, also school staff is rude to outsider,  which is not acceptable, they don't have manner how to speak with girls

Having recently toured Shiv Nadar School in Gurgaon, I must commend the institution for its impressive dedication to educational excellence and student development.

During my visit, I was struck by the school's welcoming atmosphere and modern facilities. The campus is well-maintained and offers a variety of resources to support student learning and growth.

What truly stood out to me, however, was the school's emphasis on fostering a well-rounded education. From rigorous academics to a wide range of extracurricular activities, Shiv Nadar School ensures that students have ample opportunities to explore their interests and talents.

The faculty members I encountered were knowledgeable, approachable, and clearly passionate about teaching. It was evident that they go above and beyond to support their students both inside and outside the classroom.

Additionally, the school's commitment to innovation and technology integration was impressive. Students have access to cutting-edge tools and resources that enhance their learning experience and prepare them for the challenges of the future.

Overall, my experience visiting Shiv Nadar School Gurgaon left me thoroughly impressed. It is clear that the school is dedicated to providing a high-quality education that empowers students to succeed academically, socially, and personally. As a visitor, I highly recommend Shiv Nadar School to families seeking a nurturing and enriching educational environment for their children.

Many points before i really moved my kid out -
1. They dont teach but take exams. (ASL, Steam and hundreds of pointless crafts but they teach nothing, guide in nothing, help in nothing just take test and score ...god knows on what basis). More effort in MUN and OLE than actual study.

2. Teachers dont coordinate with each others. One asks for a session the other stops. in the end kids suffer no grade level or even section level coordination.

3. Shady scoring method that even god will not understand so you never know how your kid is progressing some weighted average and not score on term exams.

4. many many many art sports teachers. but zero in sports zero arts zero crafts or  any other extra curricular. Every extra session sometime come with extra cost.

5. If you survived the above then last goes the deadly blow. Miserable results in board or any entrance (read NEET JEE etc) or olympiad. They are just not anywhere in any list of any importance.

If you want your kid to learn and make a career as well, you know what to do.
Best school where children expand their mindset and get out of their comfort zone!!

State of the art infra and facilities.
Everything has designed in a very planned and systematic way.

The registration process is flawed and malicious. One has to pay the registration amount first and then the details have to be filled. I paid the amount and then while filling the transport section, I got to know that the school does not provide transport facility to the place I reside. This is a non-starter for me as I would require this facility. Therefore, I have to abandon filling the form and lost the registration amount. This process adopted by the school seems to be intended towards collecting as much money as they can. If the registration has to be successful upon payment of the fees, then the request for the payment could be at the end itself so that the prospective parents could make an informed decision (like in my case, I will not opt for this school as transport facility is not available). I request refund of the registration fees from the school authorities. This is sheer example of fooling the parents and get their hard earned money
